question: What term refers to the ability of a deep learning network to represent complex inputs due to its multiple layers?
What is the main issue with computing the gradient of the loss function using the entire dataset, according to equation (8.6)?

options.label: A
options.text: It requires a large number of computations

options.label: B
options.text: It is very expensive and requires evaluating the model on every example

options.label: C
options.text: It is not a major concern in current deep learning architectures

options.label: D
options.text: It is a desirable property of the gradient

question: Which of the following statements about optimization algorithms is true?

options.label: A
options.text: They converge much faster if they are allowed to slowly compute the exact gradient

options.label: B
options.text: They converge much faster if they are allowed to rapidly compute approximate estimates of the gradient

options.label: C
options.text: They have no correlation with the number of examples used to estimate the gradient

options.label: D
options.text: They always converge to the optimal solution
